zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival於1392年12月13日出生在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利時，她的父親Thomas Neville27歲，母親Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival23歲。她於1407年3月12日之前與Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1423年12月13日在英國諾廷加姆爾享年31歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival于1392年12月13日出生在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利时，她的父亲Thomas Neville27岁，母亲Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival23岁。她于1407年3月12日之前与Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1423年12月13日在英国諾廷加姆爾享年31岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普。

nameMeanings.name: Neville,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival was born on 13 December 1392, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, her father, Thomas Neville, was 27 and her mother, Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival, was 23. She married Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury before 12 March 1407. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 December 1423, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival est née le 13 décembre 1392, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Neville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury avant 12 mars 1407. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 décembre 1423, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival am 13. Dezember 1392 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Neville 27 und ihre Mutter Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival 23. Sie hat vor 12. März 1407 Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Dezember 1423 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival è nata il il 13 dicembre 1392 nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Neville, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury prima del 12 marzo 1407. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 dicembre 1423, nel Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude Neville, Baroness Furnivalが1392年12月13日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Nevilleは27歳，母Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnivalは23歳であった。1407年3月12日以前にSir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1423年12月13日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで31歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival(이)가 1392년 12월 13일 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Neville(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1407년 3월 12일 이전 Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 12월 13일 영국 노틴그함실르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에 묻혔다.

mn.13 December 1392–13 December 1423: 1392 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 13–1423 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 13

pt.13 December 1392–13 December 1423: 13 de dezembro de 1392–13 de dezembro de 1423
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival nasceu em 13 de dezembro de 1392, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Neville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury antes 12 de março de 1407. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1423, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival родилась 13 декабря 1392 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Neville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury перед 12 марта 1407 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 декабря 1423 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.13 December 1392–13 December 1423: 13 de diciembre de 1392–13 de diciembre de 1423
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival nació el 13 de diciembre de 1392, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Neville, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury antes de 12 de marzo de 1407. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1423, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
